overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 game footage featuring a massive neon-lit megabuilding viewed from a waterfront promenade, transitioning to an aerial drone flight through a futuristic cityscape at night. The clip showcases dense urban architecture with heavy neon signage, reflective water surfaces, and sparse flying vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk waterfront promenade facing neon megabuilding

agents.ego_description: stationary camera slowly panning across the waterfront, observing the illuminated megabuilding and its reflection in the water

entered.detail: massive multi-tiered building complex covered in red and blue neon signage with distinctive vertical light strips
dark reflective water in foreground mirroring the neon lights of the buildings
tall industrial structures with minimal lighting on the far left skyline
elevated bridge or walkway structure with red neon underlighting on the right side
prominent vertical red neon strips running up the main building facade

segments.scene_description: A static ground-level view from a waterfront promenade looking up at a massive cyberpunk megabuilding covered in vibrant red and blue neon lights. The building's reflection shimmers in the dark water below, while industrial structures loom in the distance on the left. The scene is devoid of people, creating a moody, atmospheric nightscape typical of a futuristic dystopian city.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of cyberpunk city main avenue

events.description: camera cuts from ground-level waterfront to high aerial drone perspective moving forward through the city canyon

agents.ego_description: flying forward through the city in a drone, descending slightly while observing the urban canyon and traffic below

notable_agents.action: flying car moving across the sky in the distance, silhouetted against the horizon glow

entered.detail: wide multi-lane street or canal running through the city center, visible far below
dense cluster of high-rise buildings covered in colorful neon advertisements and signage
building with large illuminated 'CALIFORNIA' text signage near the top
orange and yellow glowing light band on the horizon beyond the city buildings
tall industrial chimneys or stacks visible on the far horizon

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts dramatically to an aerial drone view flying forward through a cyberpunk city canyon. The previously viewed megabuilding now appears on the right side as the camera moves past it. Below lies a wide avenue flanked by dense clusters of neon-lit skyscrapers, while flying vehicles traverse the sky and an orange glow illuminates the distant horizon beyond industrial stacks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from a moody, ground-level observation of a monolithic structure into a sweeping aerial journey through a dense futuristic metropolis. It begins as a static view from a waterfront promenade, looking up at a massive megabuilding draped in vibrant red and blue neon that shimmers in the dark water below. The perspective then shifts dramatically, lifting off the ground to become a forward-moving drone flight that glides past the megabuilding now positioned to the right. As the camera accelerates through a city canyon, the view expands to reveal a wide avenue flanked by clusters of neon-lit skyscrapers and flying vehicles traversing the sky. The scene finally opens up toward the horizon, where an orange glow illuminates distant industrial stacks under the night sky.
